title: Simple Sentences
description: Practice typing full sentences with proper punctuation
content: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. She sells sea shells by the seashore. How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood?

title: Speed Builder
description: Fast-paced common word combinations to build typing speed

title: Punctuation Practice
description: Master commas, periods, apostrophes, and other punctuation marks
content: Don't stop! Can't you see it's perfect? Yes, I know. Wait—that's not right. "Hello," she said. It's a bird; it's a plane! Really? Are you sure, though? Let's go, now.

title: Paragraph Typing
description: Full paragraph typing for fluency and endurance
content: Typing is a skill that improves with consistent daily practice. The best typists don't just type fast—they type accurately and with great rhythm. Focus on hitting every key cleanly before worrying about speed. Speed will come naturally as your muscle memory builds over time. Set a daily goal and stick to it.

title: JavaScript Basics
content: const fetchData = async (url) => { try { const res = await fetch(url); const data = await res.json(); return data; } catch (err) { console.error(err); } };
